customManagers.description: Single-value tool ARGs (datasource=github-releases; verified at build time against an upstream checksum file). Scoped to github-releases so it does not also match the github-tags plugin block below.
Helm plugins: ARG version plus a paired commit-SHA pin, kept in sync via digest lookup

packageRules.description: Stay on the helm v3 line (ARG is HELM3_VERSION; helmfile drives helm3, v4 is a breaking major)
Group the three helm plugins into a single PR
age and yq carry pinned per-arch sha256 hashes that Renovate cannot regenerate; flag so the merger runs `just update-checksums`
prBodyNotes: :warning: This bumps a tool whose per-arch SHA256 is pinned in the Dockerfile. Before merging, run `just update-checksums`, paste the printed values into the `case` blocks, and push to this branch — otherwise the image build will fail the checksum verification.
